title: crataegus × uhrovae var. subcurvisepala
intro: Crataegus × uhrovae var. subcurvisepala is a specific variety of hawthorn, a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family, known for its thorny branches and fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Crataegus × uhrovae var. subcurvisepala include improved cardiovascular function, reduced risk of heart disease, and potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to treat cardiovascular issues and promote overall well-being.
